props.title: Your Software Has a Thousand Authors You Have Never Met. That Is the Vulnerability Nobody Patches.
Supply Chain Vulnerability
props.message: On March 31, a North Korean hacking group compromised Axios (100M weekly npm installs) by adding a phantom dependency. The attack was contained in 3 hours, but the vulnerable architecture exists in every modern application.

props.text: MiroShark built 41 API surfaces using only Python's standard library, eliminating the trust decisions that make supply chain attacks possible.
A May 2026 arXiv paper validates the approach: stdlib-only implementations match or beat third-party libraries in most categories.
